Command.Name: reset
Command.Description: 🧹 Reset all bkcli settings and remove the local license file. Use this if you're starting over.

Command.Name: register
Command.Description: 🔑 Register your license using an API key from your Blazor For Kids account.

Option.Description: The API key from your account

Command.Name: trycheck
Command.Description: 🔄 Check if your license is still valid. If offline, it skips errors. This runs automatically when opening solutions.

Command.Name: check
Command.Description: ✅ Force-check your license with the server and refresh it if needed. Requires internet.

Command.Name: update
Command.Description: 📦 Download and install the latest Blazor For Kids packages allowed by your license.

Command.Name: upgrade
Command.Description: 🧑‍💻 Upgrades your Blazor For Kids SDK to the latest version in current project. Run this command from the root of your solution to ensure all projects are updated correctly. Future updates may include automatic fixes for breaking changes.

Command.Name: version
Command.Description: 📌 Show the current version of the bkcli tool.

Command.Name: info
Command.Description: 📘 Show beginner-friendly info about what bkcli does and how to use it.

Command.Name: copy-license
Command.Description: 🔒 Copy license file to Blazor for Kids projects (internal use only)

Option.Description: Path where the LicenseInfo.cs file should be created.

Command.Name: repair-license
Command.Description: 🛠 Repairs the embedded license file. Run this command from the root of your solution to ensure all license files are properly updated. After running, restart your IDE to reload the project.
